channel.title: Journal — Igor For Men
channel.description: Notes on men's grooming from a private West Hollywood salon.

item.title: Male Brazilian Wax in West Hollywood: What the Appointment Covers
item.description: A male Brazilian wax in West Hollywood removes all hair from the pubic region, including the shaft, scrotum, and the area between the buttocks. The appointment takes 30 to 45 minutes in a private room. You undress from the waist down, lie on a treatment table, and the practitioner applies hard wax in sections. The result lasts two to four weeks. The male Brazilian covers five zones: the pubic mou…

item.title: Back Waxing for Men in West Hollywood: Half, Full, or Shoulders?
item.description: Back waxing in West Hollywood includes three main options: half back, full back, and shoulders only. A half back covers the lower or upper section depending on where you carry the most growth. A full back runs from the neck to the waistline and includes the shoulder blades. Shoulder-only waxing targets the cap and upper trapezius. Most men book a full back when they want consistent results and ch…

item.title: Sugaring vs Waxing for Men: Which Hurts Less, Lasts Longer?
item.description: Sugaring and hard wax both remove hair from the root and deliver results that last two to four weeks. Hard wax adheres to the hair shaft and pulls coarse growth cleanly from areas like the back, chest, and scrotum. Sugar paste wraps around each strand and lifts it in the direction of growth, which can reduce breakage on finer hair. Pain levels depend more on your skin sensitivity and the practiti…

item.title: What 21+ Years of Waxing Men Has Taught Rene'
item.description: Twenty-one years of waxing men has taught Rene' that consistency beats speed, discretion matters more than small talk, and reading skin type in the first sixty seconds determines the entire appointment. Most men arrive nervous and leave surprised the experience was straightforward. The difference between a practitioner who has seen thousands of male clients and one who has seen dozens shows in ho…

item.title: Aftercare Hour-by-Hour: 0–72 Hours After Your Brazilian
item.description: The best aftercare for a male Brazilian wax follows a strict timeline: cool the skin in the first 24 hours, avoid friction and heat, wear loose cotton, and start gentle exfoliation on day three. Most redness fades within 12 hours. Bumps or ingrowns appear between days two and five if you skip exfoliation or wear tight clothing too soon. Leave the salon and go straight home if possible. Your skin …

item.title: Brazilian vs Manzilian: What is the Difference?
item.description: A Brazilian wax and a Manzilian are the same service. Both remove all hair from the pubic region, including the shaft, scrotum, and area between the buttocks. "Manzilian" is a marketing term that emerged in the mid-2000s to signal the service was designed for men. Most salons in West Hollywood now use "male Brazilian" or simply "Brazilian" regardless of gender. The procedure, technique, and resul…

item.title: Men's Waxing in West Hollywood: Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: Men's waxing in West Hollywood covers Brazilian, back, chest, arm, leg, and eyebrow services performed by licensed estheticians in private settings. Appointments run 30–60 minutes depending on the area. Most salons use hard wax, which adheres to hair rather than skin and reduces irritation. Pricing starts around $65 for eyebrows and reaches $195+ for full legs or combined areas. West Hollywood sa…

item.title: How Much Does a Male Brazilian Wax Cost in LA? (2026 Pricing Guide)
item.description: A male Brazilian wax in Los Angeles typically starts at $145 and can reach $200 or more depending on the salon, practitioner experience, and service model. At Igor For Men in West Hollywood, the service begins at $145+ and includes a private suite, hard wax application, and a practitioner with over 21 years of experience. Prices reflect the appointment-only model and discreet setting on Larrabee …

item.title: Your First Male Brazilian in West Hollywood: A Discreet Walk-Through
item.description: A first-time male Brazilian wax takes 30–45 minutes in a private suite. You undress from the waist down, lie on a cushioned table, and the practitioner applies hard wax in sections—front, underside, and between. The wax hardens in seconds and lifts off without strips. Most men describe the sensation as sharp but brief, and easier than they expected. Book your appointment at least 48 hours out. Ha…
